title: [skip-ci] Packit: `packages: [skopeo-fedora]` for podman-next jobs
body:
Without this change, packit will trigger duplicate jobs on podman-next for `skopeo-fedora`, `skopeo-centos` etc, which essentially point to the same spec file.

1 triggered job builds packages for all environments enabled on the COPR, so simply `skopeo-fedora` should suffice.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Makes sense to me with the little I know, please merge when appropriate.
centos-stream failures are dependent on a newer golang build. Ignoring for now and merging. Thanks @mtrmac
